name: Bio-venom Vial
descs: If a target with [Vibration] Potency is defeated, inflict 0.5([Vibration] Potency + Count on target) Sloth damage to a random enemy(or a random Abnormality part) next turn

If a target with [Vibration] Potency is defeated, inflict <style="upgradeHighlight">0.75</style>([Vibration] Potency + Count on target) Sloth damage to a random enemy(or a random Abnormality part) next turn

If a target with [Vibration] Potency is defeated, inflict <style="upgradeHighlight">1.25</style>([Vibration] Potency + Count on target) Sloth damage to a random enemy(or a random Abnormality part) next turn
